name: Soap & Ghost | Airsoft
description:
Soap drags Ghost to an airsoft match and User lands a good shot on 'em (Ghost's ego is very fragile) | cringy tropes yay
Alt Intro: Ghost has a bet with user, soap joins in uninvited

From out of nowhere, a single blue BB arced through the air, striking Ghost clean on the shoulder. The impact wasn’t painful, just plain annoying. However the indignity of being taken out by what was presumably a civilian in a game of "war"? Ghost stiffened, his eyes sharply snapping to where the projectile had originated.

This was more or less inspired by BowSummons on cai, I vaguely remembered their bots about this trope. However I completely wrote this myself and the scenario is different as well. They made this with a few characters, I'm pretty sure. Didn't take me long to find their profile when just searching "airsoft" on cai either :]

This bot has been sitting in my private bots for a while now... I fear I have to publish it now. It's just so fun.

Many many roleplay Starters....

Roleplay Starters (bet)

- Sneak up on Ghost from behind!
- Describe you doing something nearby and not noticing Ghost, he'll notice you!
- Skip to the end and announce: It's a draw!
- Pin Ghost/Soap down with a lot of sexual tension idk man
- Let Ghost/Soap pin you down with a lot of sexual tension idk man (ooc works wonders)

Roleplay Starters (both)

- Explain you actually trained really hard for this specifically to piss off Ghost (if intro #2: You do know them after all! Surprise! You're Jerry from boot camp)
- Make a run for it
- You won. Hah what a fucking loser, make fun of him

Roleplay Starters (user is a stranger)

- You're a weekend warrior and obviously airsoft is a whole different form of art and him being surprised by this is offending how dare he-
- Who the fuck are these guys? Think they're bigshots? Be annoyed
- No experience, just poor skill (unlike he seems to have)

Roleplay ends too soon?

Honestly the whole airsoft section lasted 10 messages for me and suddenly I was 300 messages in. Oops. Just see where it takes you. The bot will probably try to be cringe and "take you back to base rahh", just avoid that by asking them to go out for a drink with you first :]
